given: Stock table with 100 rows, each with an inventory_code
then: All 100 rows have batch_number and serial_number values (populated or NULL)
architectural_notes: Infra: a contract on migration completeness across the whole data store (every row processed, populated or NULL, none skipped), asserted by a row-count integrity probe on the paired branch. Owner: the Alembic revision (single set-based UPDATE) in the repository/migration layer. Cross-cutting concern: data integrity (R1), no silent data loss; the probe surfaces the nonconforming count before the change is accepted.

independence.rationale: AC2-4 test parsing logic for specific code formats; AC5 tests that the migration processes all rows without skipping any
